description: Collaborative document editing platform with real-time co-editing, version history, and PDF export.

intents.name: create_document
intents.description: Create a new document from a template or blank. Returns document ID and editor URL.

intents.name: search_documents
intents.description: Full-text search across the user's documents. Returns matching documents with title, last modified date, owner, and preview snippet.

intents.name: share_document
intents.description: Share a document with collaborators by email. Supports view-only, comment, and edit permissions.

intents.name: export_document
intents.description: Export a document as PDF, DOCX, or Markdown. Returns a download URL valid for 24 hours.
